query: UPDATE users SET cpf = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpf, '.', ''), '-', ''), ' ', '') WHERE cpf LIKE '%-%' OR cpf LIKE '%.%' OR cpf LIKE '% %';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute UPDATE users SET cpf = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cpf, '.', ''), '-', ''), ' ', '') WHERE cpf LIKE '%-%' OR cpf LIKE '%.%' OR cpf LIKE '% %';
